page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7a-nps1.8xlarge is a general-purpose server instance powered by an AMD EPYC 7T83 processor. Operating on the x86_64 architecture, it features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs with a single thread per core configuration running at 2.55 GHz. The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps. Virtualization is managed via the KVM hypervisor.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core capabilities, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance and PassMark CPU encryption tests ranking in the top 25%. Multi-core CPU performance and PassMark CPU scores fall within the average range. Memory performance is mixed; while the PassMark memory score is strong, large-block uncached memory write bandwidth is relatively weak, landing in the bottom 25% at 19.13 GB/sec. Cryptographic operations benefit from hardware-accelerated instruction sets including AES, VAES, and SHA_NI.

Given its balanced resource allocation and dedicated CPU cores, this instance is suited for general-purpose workloads, multi-threaded application servers, and database operations. The lack of local storage requires external storage configuration, which may introduce latency tradeoffs depending on network conditions. It is a qualitatively cost-efficient option for workloads requiring dedicated CPU execution without the overhead of hyperthreading or the need for specialized GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7a-nps1.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores on an AMD EPYC 7T83 processor running at 2.55 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it provides 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB per core. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, utilizing an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data shows strong single-core CPU performance and encryption capabilities, though large-block memory write bandwidth is a relative bottleneck. It is well-suited for general-purpose workloads, database operations, and multi-threaded applications requiring dedicated CPU resources.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7a-nps1.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 128 GB RAM, and 8 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for balanced multi-threaded workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7a-nps1.8xlarge features 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores and 128 GB RAM for balanced general-purpose and database workloads.
tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC instance delivering balanced compute and memory resources for multi-threaded enterprise workloads without local storage overhead.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated AMD EPYC 7T83 physical cores running at 2.55 GHz
128.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core
Strong single-core CPU and cryptographic encryption benchmark performance
8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
No local storage or GPU hardware included
Suited for general-purpose applications, database operations, and web serving
